attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Proxy file descriptor saturation

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE dmcproxy_process_open_fds IS NOT NULL
    AND dmcproxy_process_max_fds IS NOT NULL
    AND dmcproxy_process_max_fds > 0
| STATS
    avg_open = AVG(dmcproxy_process_open_fds),
    avg_max = AVG(dmcproxy_process_max_fds)
  BY proxy, node, cluster
| EVAL fd_util_pct = ROUND(avg_open / avg_max * 100, 2)
// Alert when file descriptor utilization exceeds 80%
// The DMC proxy uses one FD per client connection; exhaustion rejects new connections
// Investigate connection leaks, increase system ulimits, or add connection pooling
| WHERE fd_util_pct > 80
| SORT fd_util_pct DESC
